download.failedHint: Please try again, or contact the project admin.

auth.subtitle: Sign in to Artifact Center
auth.errorWeakPassword: Password is too weak: min 8 chars, letters + digits, not a common password.
auth.demoHint: Demo: demo@enterprise.local / Demo@2026 (new accounts must set a policy-compliant password)

password.policyHint: Prefer 12+ characters with mixed case and symbols.

issue.only_repeat: Cannot be a single repeated character
issue.same_as_current: Must differ from the current password

channelHint.deprecated: Do not use for new installs

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage account, appearance, member permissions, and artifact retention.
settings.generalDesc: Edit your display name and email. Role is assigned by access control and cannot be changed here.
settings.accountHint: Demo session · role comes from the signed-in account
settings.avatarHint: JPG / PNG / WebP, up to 2 MB.
settings.avatarErrorSize: Image must be 2 MB or smaller.
settings.passwordDesc: Update your sign-in password. Use a strong new password.
settings.passwordLead: You will need the new password next time you sign in. Avoid weak passwords reused elsewhere.
settings.passwordErrorWeak: New password does not meet the security policy.
settings.passwordErrorSame: New password must differ from the current one.
settings.resetPasswordDesc: Admins can set a temporary password. The user signs in with it next time.
settings.passwordResetDesc: {{name}} can sign in with the new password.
settings.resetForbidden: Only admins can reset other users’ passwords.
settings.appearanceDesc: Theme and language apply immediately and stay on this device.
settings.membersDesc: Add or remove members and assign roles for settings, upload, and download access.
settings.membersHint: Demo data stays on this device and is not synced to a server.
settings.memberErrorDuplicate: This email is already in the member list.
settings.memberErrorLastAdmin: At least one admin is required.

roleDesc.admin: Manage settings and members; upload, edit, download, archive, and delete
roleDesc.maintainer: Upload, edit metadata, download, and archive — cannot change settings
roleDesc.viewer: Download artifacts only — cannot upload or edit

settings.retentionDesc: Storage usage and cleanup policy live here, not on the home page.
settings.storageHint: Simulated quota for now. Real usage will come from the backend.
settings.maxVersionsHint: When over the limit, older builds not marked Latest are cleaned first.
settings.archiveDaysHint: Deprecated artifacts may auto-archive after this many days.
settings.dangerDesc: Irreversible or session-ending actions. Confirm before you proceed.
settings.logoutDesc: End this session and return to sign-in. Theme and language stay local.

search.hint: Type a keyword. Results are grouped by applications and artifacts.
search.footerHint: {{shortcut}} anytime · ↑↓ to select · Enter to open
search.emptyDesc: Nothing matched “{{query}}” in apps or artifacts.
search.pageDesc: Find applications and builds within your access.
search.startDesc: Try an app name, package, version, or uploader.

appSettings.title: Info & status
appSettings.description: View this app’s identity and lifecycle status.
appSettings.sectionInfoHint: Name, identifier, owner, and related basics.
appSettings.statusHint: Shown on the app card and detail header. Changes apply after you save.
appSettings.errorRequired: Name, description, and package are required.
appSettings.dangerDesc: Deletion cannot be undone. Confirm carefully before continuing.
appSettings.deleteDesc: Permanently remove this app from the catalog. In demo mode it only hides local data.
appSettings.deleteConfirmLead: “{{name}}” will be removed. Type the application name to confirm.
appSettings.deleteNameMismatch: Name does not match. Enter the full application name.

createApp.title: New application
createApp.description: Register an application. You’ll open its detail next, then upload artifacts when ready.
createApp.sectionBasicsHint: These fields identify the app in lists, detail, and upload ownership.
createApp.descriptionPlaceholder: One line about what this app does
createApp.errorRequired: Name, description, and package are required.
createApp.referenceHintIdle: Type a name or package to see similar apps in the catalog.
createApp.referenceHintActive: Use these for naming style and to avoid duplicates.
createApp.referenceEmpty: Start typing a name or package to compare.
createApp.packageTaken: Package is already used by “{{name}}”. Choose another before creating.

applications.title: Applications
applications.description: Browse internal apps and jump into their artifacts.
applications.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, package, or owner…
applications.emptyDescription: Register an application first, then upload and distribute artifacts.
applications.noMatchDescription: Try another keyword, or clear filters.

detail.notFoundDescription: This app does not exist, or you do not have access.
detail.recentVersionsHint: Last three builds. Prefer the one marked Latest.
detail.artifactsHint: All builds. Scan by version, download as needed.
detail.releaseNotesHint: Version notes from uploads, newest first.
detail.releaseNotesEmptyDesc: Notes appear here after you upload builds with release notes.
detail.releaseNotesEmptyHasBuilds: Builds exist, but none include release notes yet. Add notes on the next upload.
detail.noVersions: Upload the first artifact and recent builds will show up here.
detail.emptyArtifactsDesc: Uploaded builds will appear in this list.

upload.title: Upload Artifact
upload.hint3: Confirm version metadata. Notes and channel are yours to edit.
upload.noAppsYet: No applications to choose from yet.
upload.dropHint: or click to browse · APK / AAB / EXE / ZIP
upload.mockPipeline: Demo pipeline — files are not uploaded for real
upload.errTooLarge: File is too large. Max size is {{size}}.
upload.errWrongPlatform: File type does not match the selected application platform.
upload.errUnsupported: This format is not enabled yet (IPA / Firmware / Docker).
upload.duplicateDesc: v{{version}} already exists as the latest for {{name}}. Change the version before publishing.
upload.draftSaved: Draft saved on this device. You can publish when ready.
upload.publishedDesc: The artifact is in the catalog — open the app to view and download.

share.title: Share download link
share.description: Create a link for “{{name}}”. Recipients open it, review the file, then download if they choose.
share.modeLatestHint: Opens the current recommended build; updates when you publish.
share.modeArtifactHint: Always downloads v{{version}}, even after newer builds ship.
share.copyFailed: Could not copy — select the link manually
share.landingLatest: This link points at the current recommended build
share.landingPinned: This link is pinned to a specific version
share.confirmHint: Review the details, then click download when you’re ready.
share.invalidDesc: This link is malformed or corrupted.
share.noArtifactDesc: This app has no shareable build yet, or the pinned version is not available here.
share.contactUnknown: No sharer is recorded on this link. Ask whoever sent it to you.
